ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the employee joined the company */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the company (if applicable) */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position of the employee */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the employee works */,
  "hiring_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hiring manager who brought the employee on board */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number for payroll and legal purposes */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  "onboarding_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started their onboarding process */,
  "termination_reason" TEXT /* Reason for termination (if applicable) */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date of termination (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_hiring_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("hiring_manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shops" (
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "shop_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the store was opened */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the store was closed (if applicable) */,
  "store_size" TEXT /* Size of the store (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees currently working in the store */,
  "annual_sales" REAL /* Annual sales of the store */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the store is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shops_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the position belongs to */,
  "required_qualifications" TEXT /* Qualifications required for the position */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Key responsibilities of the position */,
  "hourly_wage" REAL /* Hourly wage for hourly positions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given in the performance review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the performance review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who conducted the review */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the review */,
  "review_period" TEXT /* Period the review covers */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Specific metrics used in the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_records" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who attended the training */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the training was conducted */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer who conducted the training */,
  "training_location" TEXT /* Location where the training was conducted */,
  "training_cost" REAL /* Cost of the training program */,
  "training_certificate" INTEGER /* Whether a certificate was issued for the training */,
  "training_efficacy" REAL /* Efficacy of the training program (e.g., feedback score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_records_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benefit (if applicable) */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit */,
  "benefit_cost" REAL /* Cost of the benefit to the company */,
  "benefit_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit */,
  "benefit_coverage" TEXT /* Coverage details of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the trainer */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the trainer */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience the trainer has */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the trainer */,
  "training_specializing_in" TEXT /* Specialized areas of training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)
